Full job description
LabX Media Group is a fast-growing science media company at the forefront of digital publishing. We create engaging content across multiple online platforms, publish industry-leading websites, and deliver data-driven solutions to connect scientific communities around the world. We are an organization in high growth mode, both organic as well as through a full spectrum of acquisitions. We have previously been named to the PROFIT 500: Canada's Fastest-Growing Companies and are one of only a few companies in all of Simcoe County.

There are lots of exciting things going on with our company and here is an opportunity to be a part of it!

About the role

We are looking for a Client Services Manager to own the delivery and client experience of our custom content projects.

You will take over once a deal is signed. You will manage timelines, coordinate internal teams, and act as the main point of contact for clients. You will also manage a small team and play a key role in improving how we deliver work as we scale.

This is a senior, hands-on role. You will run projects directly while overseeing delivery across the wider team. You will work closely with sales, editorial, design, and operations to ensure projects are delivered on time, on brief, and to a high standard.

We work with clients across life sciences, chemistry, and analytical science. You will manage projects for a technical, science-literate audience, so a background in biology, chemistry, or a related field is essential.

What you will do

Own project delivery

Manage a portfolio of client projects from handover to completion
Define timelines, milestones and deliverables
Ensure all work is delivered on time and within scope
Manage client relationships

Act as the main point of contact for clients post-sale
Run kickoff calls and ongoing check-ins
Handle feedback, revisions and approvals with clarity and professionalism
Lead and support a small team

Manage and develop a team of 2 client services team members
Provide clear direction, support and accountability
Ensure consistent ways of working across projects
Coordinate internal teams

Work closely with editorial, design and production teams
Translate client needs into clear, actionable briefs
Keep projects moving and resolve issues quickly
Drive quality and improvement

Ensure all deliverables meet client expectations and internal standards
Refine workflows, playbooks and processes to improve efficiency and consistency
Use data and feedback to improve delivery over time
Commercial awareness

Maintain strong scope control and protect project margins
Identify opportunities for repeat work and project expansion
Work with account managers to support renewals and growth
AI adoption

Use AI tools to improve efficiency across project management, communication and workflows
Support the adoption of new tools and ways of working across the team
What we are looking for

At least 3 years’ experience in a client-facing delivery, account management or project management role, ideally in an agency, media or content environment
A degree in biology, chemistry or a related scientific discipline
Strong organisational skills and ability to manage multiple projects at once
Confident communicator, comfortable working with both clients and senior internal stakeholders
Commercial awareness, including scope control and identifying growth opportunities
Experience managing or mentoring team members
Comfortable using AI tools and open to adopting new technologies
Driven, proactive and solutions-focused
What success looks like

Projects delivered on time and on brief
Strong client relationships and repeat business
Clear, consistent communication across clients and internal teams
Improved efficiency and reduced delivery issues over time
A well-supported, high-performing team
This job posting is for a current vacancy.

LabX Media Group is an enthusiastic equal opportunity employer that values diversity, equity, and inclusion. We celebrate diverse perspectives and are committed to fostering a culture where differences are valued and innovation thrives.

Please note: Our hiring process does not involve the use of artificial intelligence (AI) for candidate screening or decision-making. All evaluations are conducted by our human resources team and hiring managers.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: £40,500.00-£55,000.00 per year

Benefits:

Additional leave
Bereavement leave
Casual dress
Company events
Company pension
Employee mentoring programme
Flexitime
Free parking
Health & wellbeing programme
On-site parking
Paid volunteer time
Referral programme
Sick pay
Work from home
Work Location: Remote
companyName: Technology Networks Ltd / LabX Media Group
shortCompanyReason: Fast-growing science media company with digital publishing and data-driven solutions.
shortRoleReason: Senior client services role owning delivery of custom content projects.
companySummary: LabX Media Group is a fast-growing science media company focused on digital publishing, online content, and data-driven solutions for scientific communities.
roleSummary: The role manages client delivery for custom content projects, coordinates internal teams, supports a small team, and improves delivery processes.
headlineAttraction: Own client delivery for science content projects in a senior role with team leadership and process improvement.
rolePurpose: To manage the delivery and client experience of custom content projects from handover to completion.
advertSummary: A senior, hands-on client services manager role in science media, responsible for post-sale project delivery, client relationships, team support, and process improvement, with an emphasis on life sciences and AI-enabled efficiency.
personalisedIntro: I’m applying for this role because it sits right at the point where I do my best work: taking ownership after handover, keeping multiple moving parts under control, and making sure clients get a clean, reliable experience. I’ve led delivery and service improvement in live, pressured environments, and I’m comfortable being the person who has to make things happen when the detail matters.
whyThisRole: This role fits the part of my background that combines client-facing delivery, internal coordination and process improvement. I like roles where I can run the work directly, keep scope under control, support a small team, and improve how delivery works as the business scales.
coreResponsibilities: Manage a portfolio of client projects from handover to completion
Ensure work is delivered on time and within scope
Act as main point of contact for clients post-sale
Run kickoff calls and ongoing check-ins
Manage and develop a team of 2 client services team members
Work closely with editorial, design and production teams
Translate client needs into actionable briefs
Ensure deliverables meet client expectations and internal standards
Use data and feedback to improve delivery
Maintain scope control and protect project margins
Identify opportunities for repeat work and expansion
Support renewals and growth with account managers
Use AI tools to improve efficiency
Support adoption of new tools and ways of working
essentialRequirements: At least 3 years’ experience in client-facing delivery, account management or project management
Experience in an agency, media or content environment
Degree in biology, chemistry or related scientific discipline
Ability to manage multiple projects at once
Comfortable with clients and senior internal stakeholders
Experience managing or mentoring team members
preferredRequirements: Experience in an agency, media or content environment
Background in biology, chemistry or related field

likelyBusinessNeeds: Reliable delivery of custom content projects
Improved client retention and repeat business
More efficient workflows as the company scales
impliedStrategicGoals: Support growth through renewals and expansion

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: Operational delivery leader who keeps complex client work moving, clear and commercially tight.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m applying for this role because it sits right at the point where I do my best work: taking ownership after handover, keeping multiple moving parts under control, and making sure clients get a clean, reliable experience. I’ve led delivery and service improvement in live, pressured environments, and I’m comfortable being the person who has to make things happen when the detail matters.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: LabX Media Group stands out to me because it is growing quickly, works across digital publishing and data-led solutions, and is operating in a space where quality and pace both matter. I also notice the emphasis on new technologies and a collaborative way of working, which fits the kind of environment where I can add value without slowing delivery down.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role fits the part of my background that combines client-facing delivery, internal coordination and process improvement. I like roles where I can run the work directly, keep scope under control, support a small team, and improve how delivery works as the business scales.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: client experience, delivery control and service follow-through
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I used stronger operational grip to improve a poor customer-facing experience in a live NHS setting, which is close to the kind of delivery discipline this role needs.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a headline proof point for client experience and service recovery.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I turned around a weak customer experience by tightening follow-through and operational control.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: managing multiple projects, team support and stakeholder coordination
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve handled business-critical projects while supporting a team and maintaining service standards, which maps well to a senior hands-on delivery role.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as supporting evidence for team leadership and multi-project management.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve balanced complex delivery, team support and service standards in a high-control environment.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Re-designed triage workflow thinking for duty doctor model
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: workflow improvement, clearer briefs and process consistency
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This shows I don’t just keep work moving; I also look for simpler, clearer ways of getting it done, which matters where delivery needs to scale.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a process-improvement example alongside delivery leadership.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve improved workflow clarity by turning messy handoffs into practical, usable process.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: I read this as a role that needs someone who can own delivery end to end, keep clients informed, and stop projects drifting off brief or off margin. It also needs someone who can give a small team structure, work well with editorial and design, and spot where the process can be made cleaner as volume grows.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Own client delivery from handover to completion
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve taken responsibility for service delivery in a live NHS setting where follow-through and consistency mattered every day.
experienceMappings.relevance: Shows I can hold the line on delivery, not just coordinate it.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported complex annual projects while keeping service standards steady and workload distributed across a team.
experienceMappings.relevance: This is the kind of multi-threaded delivery control the role calls for.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Lead and support a small team
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve led and supported a 12-person function, including workload allocation and training.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me a practical base for managing a smaller team with clarity and accountability.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Work across internal teams and stakeholders
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked across operational teams to support the prototyping, costing and implementation of a new monitoring system.
experienceMappings.relevance: This shows I can coordinate different inputs and keep a project moving.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve redesigned a triage workflow so responsibilities were clearer and the process was easier for staff to follow.
experienceMappings.relevance: Useful where delivery needs to become more consistent as the business scales.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: In manufacturing, I worked in a scale-up environment where delivery discipline, margin and resilience all mattered together.
experienceMappings.relevance: This supports the commercial side of the role, not just the coordination side.

focusAreasToBring.title: Client ownership
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would keep communication clear, manage expectations early, and make sure clients know where each project stands without having to chase.

focusAreasToBring.title: Delivery discipline
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on timelines, scope control and clean handovers so projects stay on brief and on time.

focusAreasToBring.title: Team support
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would give the small team clear priorities, steady direction and enough structure to stay consistent across projects.

focusAreasToBring.title: Process improvement
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would look for repeat friction points in the workflow and tighten them using data, feedback and simpler ways of working.

focusAreasToBring.title: Practical AI use
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would use AI where it genuinely saves time or improves consistency, but keep the process controlled and easy for the team to trust.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: My background lines up well with this role because I’ve spent my career in environments where delivery, service quality and coordination all have to hold together at once. I bring hands-on operational control, comfort with stakeholders, and a habit of improving the way work runs rather than just managing it as it is.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would expect to spend the first months getting close to the live delivery process, understanding where projects slow down, and making sure client communication is tight. I’d also look for quick wins in workflow consistency, team support and scope control, so the operation feels more predictable as volume grows.
companyHighlights: LabX Media Group is described as fast-growing and in high growth mode.
The business works across digital publishing and data-driven solutions for scientific communities.
The role sits in a company that is open to new technologies and AI-enabled efficiency.
The advert signals a collaborative, equal opportunity environment that values diversity, equity and inclusion.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments where people want straight answers, steady follow-through and practical improvement. The collaborative, solutions-focused tone in the advert fits how I like to work: clear ownership, open communication and a bias toward fixing what slows delivery down.

first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get under the skin of the current project portfolio, client expectations, internal handovers and the main points where delivery can slip.
I would work with the team to clarify responsibilities, review recurring issues, and make the delivery process easier to run consistently.
I would start tightening scope control, strengthening reporting and introducing practical improvements that help the team move faster with fewer avoidable issues.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I’d bring calm, hands-on delivery control and a practical mindset to a role that needs both client confidence and operational discipline.
closingProofPoints: I improved a live NHS service experience from 2.09 to 4.51 on Google reviews.
I supported a 12-person function while maintaining service standards in a regulated environment.
I’ve improved workflow clarity and delivery resilience in both healthcare and manufacturing settings.
contentNotes: I have not claimed direct science-media or life-sciences client services experience because it is not shown in the CV or evidence bank.
I have used the biology/chemistry requirement only as a role signal; I cannot evidence a scientific degree from the provided CV.
I selected evidence that best supports delivery control, stakeholder handling, team support and process improvement rather than trying to mirror the advert line by line.

examples.title: “Re-designed triage workflow thinking for duty doctor model”
